                _readonlyLocalBlock = _writableLocalBlock = new byte[BlockLength];
                sourceBlock.CopyTo(_writableLocalBlock);

                _writableLocalBlock = Memory<byte>.Empty;

        {

            var blob = await dataStore.GetBlob(blobId);
            _Field41 = blob.HasData ? Octets.Wrap(blob.Data) : Octets.Empty;

        private Octets _Field41 = Octets.Empty;

        {
            if (_Field42 is null)

                _writableLocalBlock.Slice(64, 64).Span.Clear();

            var blob = await dataStore.GetBlob(blobId);
            _Field42 = blob.HasData ? Octets.Wrap(blob.Data) : null;
